code: import React,{createContext,useContext,useState}from'react';import{INITIAL_QUEUE,INITIAL_PUBLISHED,INITIAL_TAGS,INITIAL_LAYOUTS,INITIAL_TEMELEMS,INITIAL_SETTINGS}from'../data/mock';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AppCtx=/*#__PURE__*/createContext(null);export function AppProvider(_ref){let{children}=_ref;const[queue,setQueue]=useState(INITIAL_QUEUE);const[published,setPublished]=useState(INITIAL_PUBLISHED);const[tags,setTags]=useState(INITIAL_TAGS);const[layouts,setLayouts]=useState(INITIAL_LAYOUTS);const[settings,setSettings]=useState(INITIAL_SETTINGS);const[telElems,setTelElems]=useState(INITIAL_TEMELEMS);const stats={inCoda:queue.length,sched:queue.filter(x=>x.status==='scheduled').length,pub:published.length};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AppCtx.Provider,{value:{queue,setQueue,published,setPublished,tags,setTags,layouts,setLayouts,settings,setSettings,telElems,setTelElems,stats},children:children});}export function useApp(){const ctx=useContext(AppCtx);if(!ctx)throw new Error('useApp must be used within AppProvider');return ctx;}
